info.title: Aircall Public API
info.description: Aircall Public API is a REST API for managing calls, users, contacts, numbers, teams, tags, webhooks, and messaging for cloud-based phone systems. Supports OAuth 2.0 and Basic Auth. Rate limited to 60 requests per minute per company.
